## Checklist

- [ ] **This is a playbook/methodology change, not data.** No real contacts, sent history, warm leads, call logs, do-not-contact names, target accounts, logins, or campaign/record IDs.
- [ ] **Per-rep values are `{{PLACEHOLDER}}` tokens** (e.g. `{{FIRST_NAME}}`, `{{SENDER_EMAIL}}`, `{{APOLLO_AI_EMAIL_ACCOUNT_ID}}`) — not hard-coded to any one rep.
- [ ] **I ran `scripts/pii-scan` and it passed** — no real names, emails, phone numbers, IDs, or live-data files.
- [ ] Any new live/working file is gitignored; only its `*.example.*` header ships.
